title: podman artifact add does not default to latest when creating a new artifact without a tag.
body:
### Issue Description

When I create an artifact without a tag, the latest tag does not get added, like they do with container images.  This is surprising and end up with some tagged images and others tagged with "".  I believe it should be consistent with images.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
  podman artifact add quay.io/myimage/myartifact /tmp/foobar.txt


### Describe the results you received

Describe the results you received
REPOSITORY               TAG         DIGEST        SIZE
 quay.io/myimage/myartifact                 9f6c351a7733  637.7MB


### Describe the results you expected

Describe the results you expected
REPOSITORY               TAG         DIGEST        SIZE
 quay.io/myimage/myartifact :latest                9f6c351a7733  637.7MB

comments.body: Hi! I'd like to work on this issue. Could you please assign it to me?
